## The gap

<!-- What's the plugin missing? Be specific. "It would be cool if..." is too vague. -->

## The proposal

<!-- One sentence describing the addition. -->

## Why it sharpens the discipline

The plugin is opinionated by design. Contributions that sharpen the discipline are welcome. Contributions that loosen it are not. Tell me which side this proposal lands on.

- [ ] New slash command (filling a real gap in the 18 we ship)
- [ ] New sub-agent (parallel-dispatchable work the existing 5 don't cover)
- [ ] New reference file (new canon source, new style philosophy, new lintable rule)
- [ ] New brand spec for `references/brands/` (paste a `DESIGN.md` if you have one)
- [ ] New anti-pattern rule (with regex + severity + mode)
- [ ] Other

## Alternative considered

<!-- Did you check the existing commands / sub-agents / references? Which one came closest, and why isn't it enough? -->
